1.0 EVALUATION SCOPE 
Compliance with the following codes: 
 2024, 2021, and 2018 International Building Code® (IBC) 
 2024, 2021, and 2018 International Residential Code® (IRC) 
Property evaluated: 
 Structural  
 Fire Resistance 
 Thermal Barrier 
2.0 USES  
2.1 General: 
Structural Insulated Panels are used as structural insulated roof, floor  and wall panels capable of resisting 
transverse, axial and in-plane shear loads. 
2.2 Construction Types: 
Structural Insulated Panels  shall be considered combustible building elements when determining the
